notes: The server image was rebuilt and started through Docker Desktop using SECRETS_PROVIDER=vault, VAULT_ADDR=http://vault:8200, and a Vault token supplied as deployment configuration.
Tenant secret values remain in Vault under secret/xiigen/tenants/{tenantId}/..., not in environment variables.
Cross-tenant JWT replay failed structurally for acme-corp to northwind, northwind to tessera-collective, and acme-corp to tessera-collective.
The wrong-role check uses the canonical service-account role against a route protected for tenant-user, tenant-admin, or platform-admin.
